title: Posts
description: Schema for Instagram posts collected by Collector Agent

source_type.description: Whether post was discovered from hashtag or profile

source_name.description: Name of the hashtag (without #) or profile username

post_url.description: Full URL to the Instagram post

post_date.description: ISO 8601 date when post was created

likes.description: Number of likes (may be formatted like '1,234' or empty)

comments_count.description: Number of comments (may be empty if not yet scraped)
